name: Lydia Coffey
ai_summary: Lydia Coffey from Phoenix has 12 years of nanny/babysitting experience with kids ages 2-12, is CPR/first-aid certified, and seeks part-time work with 30-40mi travel flexibility. She demonstrates strong conflict resolution skills through separation and explanation techniques, and highlights her adaptability and willingness to learn new certifications as key strengths for the role.

transcripts.q3:
Hi, my name is Lydia coffee. I've been working as a nanny for about eight months now, and I've also been working on care.com watching and helping families for kids around 2 to 12 years old. And I've always just love babysitting and carrying four kids, and helping families. I am CPR certified, and first aid, certified, and I grew up in a big family.
 Ali. So I just love being in this environment and helping kids learn and grow.
transcripts.q4: I'm currently located in Arizona in North Phoenix, but I am willing to travel up to 30 to 40 miles.
transcripts.q5: I'm looking for part-time right now. As for schedule, I can work Tuesdays to Fridays anytime.
transcripts.q6: In my experience, I will separate the two children and I will explain to them what, why they shouldn't do that, and why it's wrong. And I will try to have them talk and see if they can come to a solution on their own or if I can help them, find a solution and I'm always just to be there. So when they need to help talk it out and kind of resolve it together,
transcripts.q7: I think I'd make a great upkeep teacher because my flexibility is very good. And I'm also used to stepping in and working with new families and new kids. And I enjoy meeting new kids and learning all about them. I also am willing and open to getting any new kinds of search certifications anything like that, and yeah,
